# Zombie Debt - Collection Rights & Statute of Limitations [2026]
> Zombie debt is old or discharged debt that collectors try to revive. Learn your rights, how to dispute, and when to fight. 2026 guide.

## About
zombiedebt.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Zombie Debt and Your Credit Report - Dispute Old Debts: https://zombiedebt.org/credit-report-rights.html
- How Debt Buyers Work - The Zombie Debt Industry: https://zombiedebt.org/debt-buyers.html
- Debt Validation for Zombie Debt - Force Collectors to Prove It: https://zombiedebt.org/debt-validation.html
- Collecting on Discharged Debt - A Federal Crime: https://zombiedebt.org/discharged-debt-collection.html
- FDCPA Violations by Zombie Debt Collectors - Your Rights: https://zombiedebt.org/fdcpa-violations.html
- Zombie Debt - Collection Rights & Statute of Limitations: https://zombiedebt.org/
- Medical Zombie Debt - Old Hospital Bills Coming Back: https://zombiedebt.org/medical-zombie-debt.html
- Phantom Debt - When Collectors Chase Debts That Never Existed: https://zombiedebt.org/phantom-debt.html
- Statute of Limitations on Zombie Debt - State-by-State Rules: https://zombiedebt.org/statute-of-limitations.html
- Privacy Policy: https://zombiedebt.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
